main_post.text:
🔍 New Tool Alert: GitHub Account Scanner v0.1.0

Sunwood-ai-labs just released a local-first Python CLI for monitoring GitHub accounts.

Key Features:
✅ Track public repositories & releases
✅ Detect new repos and published releases
✅ Discord alerts with per-event threads
✅ Designed for large accounts (700+ repos)

Perfect for teams monitoring multiple projects without complex CI/CD infrastructure.

Built with Python 3.11+ and uv, MIT licensed.

$ONIAGI
